videos.headline: Why Purdue fired Ryan Walters
videos.description: Check out some stats from Ryan Walters' two seasons at Purdue after the school fired him on Sunday.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (Why Purdue fired Ryan Walters) 2024/12/01 T2V
